title: Logan Roy / Nolen Dawn, 78
notes:
inspiration for Nolen Dawn

Elon Musk was born on June 28, 1971.
So on January 1st, 2069, he would be:
👉 97 years old.


He is dying; Imagine, what would Elon do in the last year of his life? And with the rise of real Superintelligence

Old, yes. Bitter, maybe. But definitely not a nihilist. He belives in the future even as the world struggles. He believes in willpower, grit, and order.

title: Heavenly Sword Kai
notes: Kai appears to be in her late teens, yet possesses a child-like outlook on life. Her level of immaturity can most likely be attributed to the fact that her mother, as well as her entire clan, was murdered when she was young, thereby traumatizing her to the point where her mind created a sort of "happy place", where the problems going on around her couldn't reach. She isn't completely unaware of the violence around her or the seriousness of a situation, though; an example is in Chapter Three, when she goes on a rescue mission to free Nariko from Bohan's prison. Kai's appearance seems to resemble her personality as well. The developers wanted Kai to possess catlike behaviour (for example, when climbing ladders or when jumping on the wooden beams in the Fireworks section of Chapter 3) and appearance, as seen in unlockable developers' logs.

title: Heavenly Sword Kai sketch
scrivener_path: Characters/Hassan - Kali Yuga/Anais/Heavenly Sword Kai sketch
notes: Although not possessing any skill whatsoever in terms of close combat, Kai's skill with a crossbow is virtually unmatched. As shown in Riding High, she can even fire with her unerring skill while hanging upside-down by a single foot.
